profiles.name: Charlotte de Witte
profiles.scope: International techno headliner / global festival headliner
profiles.summary: Charlotte de Witte is a Belgian DJ and producer born July 21, 1992, in Ghent, Flanders. She is the founder of KNTXT — her own label, event series, and touring platform. With releases across her own imprint and KNTXT, her driving, acid-laced hard techno has made her a headliner at Tomorrowland, Awakenings, Time Warp, and major techno stages worldwide. She topped the DJ Mag Alternative Top 100 DJs in 2020.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno headliners. Facts gathered from the official Charlotte de Witte website, Resident Advisor artist profile, and the KNTXT label platform.

sources.label: Charlotte de Witte Resident Advisor profile

profiles.name: Amelie Lens
profiles.scope: International techno headliner / Belgian scene leader
profiles.summary: Amelie Lens is a Belgian DJ and producer from Vilvoorde, near Brussels, who has risen from the local underground to become one of techno's most in-demand artists. She launched the LENSKE label in 2018 and runs the Exhale event series and label concept. Her breakthrough releases on Second State established her hypnotic, high-energy sound, and she has held headline slots at Tomorrowland, Awakenings, and major European techno festivals.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno headliners. Facts sourced from LENSKE label information, the Exhale event series, and Resident Advisor artist profile.

profiles.name: Adam Beyer
profiles.summary: Adam Beyer is a Swedish DJ and producer born 1976 in Stockholm, and one of techno's defining figures for over 25 years. He founded the Drumcode label in 1995, which has become one of the most influential and commercially successful techno platforms worldwide. The Drumcode Radio show, broadcast weekly across over 60 countries, and Drumcode-labeled festival events anchor his touring output. Collaborative releases with Layton Giordani, Green Velvet, and Enrico Sangiuliano remain techno staples.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno legends. Facts sourced from the Drumcode label and the Adam Beyer artist profile.

profiles.name: Nina Kraviz
profiles.scope: International techno innovator / трип label founder
profiles.summary: Nina Kraviz is a DJ, producer, and singer born in Irkutsk, Siberia, Russia, and based in Moscow. Her 2009 breakthrough release

on Rekids established her as an international club artist. In 2014 she founded the трип (Trip) label, and later its sub-label Galaxiid, championing leftfield techno and experimental electronic music. Mixmag named her DJ of the Year in 2017.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno innovators. Facts sourced from the трип label, Mixmag profile, and Resident Advisor artist entry.

profiles.name: Carl Cox
profiles.summary: Carl Cox is a British DJ and producer born July 29, 1962, in Oldham, Greater Manchester. A defining figure in dance music, he co-founded Intec Digital (later Intec Records) in 1998 and hosted a legendary 15-year residency at Space Ibiza (2001–2016). He is widely admired for his three-deck mixing technique and marathon sets, and he also tours as a live/hybrid act under the Carl Cox Hybrid Live format.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno legends. Facts sourced from the official Carl Cox website and his Intec label.

profiles.name: Sara Landry
profiles.scope: International hard techno headliner / #1 Hard DJ
profiles.summary: Sara Landry is an American DJ and producer who made history as The World's #1 Hard DJ according to DJ Mag 2025 rankings. Known for her intense hard techno sets that push the boundaries of the harder dance sounds, she has become a leading figure in the global hard techno scene.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for hard techno. Sources include DJ Mag 2025 rankings and hard dance community reporting.

sources.label: DJ Mag Top 100 2025 - Hard DJ Rankings

profiles.name: Anyma
profiles.scope: International melodic techno headliner / The Sphere residency
profiles.summary: Anyma is the solo alias of Matteo Milleri, one half of Tale of Us. As Anyma, he delivers high-concept progressive house and melodic techno at venues like The Sphere in Las Vegas, where he was the first electronic act to have a residency. Ranked #10 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for melodic techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and The Sphere residency reporting.

profiles.name: Reinier Zonneveld
profiles.summary: Reinier Zonneveld is a Dutch DJ and producer known for his energetic techno and tech house sets. He has achieved remarkable success on Beatport charts and has become a staple at major festivals. Ranked #22 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno. Sources include Beatport chart success and DJ Mag rankings.

profiles.name: Indira Paganotto
profiles.summary: Indira Paganotto is a Spanish DJ and producer who has been making waves in the techno scene with her powerful performances and psytrance-influenced techno sound. Ranked #36 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for emerging techno artists. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025.

profiles.name: I Hate Models
profiles.summary: I Hate Models is a French DJ and producer known for his dark, industrial techno sound. His performances are characterized by intense energy and a raw, uncompromising approach. Ranked #79 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for industrial techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and RA artist profiles.

sources.label: I Hate Models Resident Advisor profile

profiles.name: Boris Brejcha
profiles.scope: International techno/tech house / F PMP label
profiles.summary: Boris Brejcha is a German DJ and producer known for his unique style combining techno and tech house with minimalist elements. Founder of the F PMP (Feed Demming Pandas) label, he performs wearing a mask and is known as 'The Yellow Wizard'. A consistent top 20 DJ Mag performer.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno. Sources include F PMP label official and DJ Mag rankings.

profiles.name: Nico Moreno
profiles.summary: Nico Moreno is a French DJ and producer known for his aggressive hard techno sound. He is associated with Bastard Squad and has gained recognition for his high-energy performances that push the boundaries of hard dance music. Ranked #67 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for hard techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and Bastard Squad community.

profiles.name: Lilly Palmer
profiles.summary: Lilly Palmer is a Swiss DJ and producer who has made a significant impact on the techno scene with her powerful sets and productions. She is signed to deadmau5's mau5trap label. Ranked #57 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and mau5trap label.

profiles.name: Peggy Gou
profiles.summary: Peggy Gou is a South Korean DJ and producer who has become a global sensation. Known for her joyful, genre-blending sets that span house, techno, and disco, she brings an infectious energy to her performances. Ranked #12 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025, making her one of the highest-placed female artists.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for house/techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and RA artist profiles.

profiles.name: Richie Hawtin
profiles.scope: International techno legend / minimal techno pioneer
profiles.summary: Richie Hawtin is a British-Canadian DJ and producer who pioneered minimal techno and never stopped innovating. From the legendary Plus 8 and M_nus labels to his CLOSE shows and technology experiments, Hawtin represents the intellectual edge of techno. His influence on the sound of Berlin and global minimal techno is immeasurable.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for techno pioneers. Sources include Plus 8/M_nus labels and RA artist profiles.

profiles.name: Klangkuenstler
profiles.summary: Klangkuenstler is a German DJ and producer known for his hard techno sound. He is associated with the Outworld label and has performed internationally, including the notable Outworld Tour. His sets are characterized by powerful kicks and intense energy.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for hard techno. Sources include Outworld label and hard techno community reporting.

profiles.name: Fantasm
profiles.summary: Fantasm is a French DJ and producer known for their hard techno productions and energetic performances. Emerging from the French underground scene, Fantasm has been gaining international recognition for their aggressive yet danceable sound. Ranked #93 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for hard techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and French techno community.

profiles.name: Marlon Hoffstadt
profiles.summary: Marlon Hoffstadt is a German DJ and producer who has emerged as a significant figure in the hard techno scene. Associated with Darkbox Berlin, his sets feature a blend of hard techno and industrial elements. Ranked #100 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025, marking his debut in the rankings.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for emerging hard techno artists. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 debut ranking.

profiles.name: Miss Monique
profiles.summary: Miss Monique (Sonia de Gascuel) is a Russian-born DJ and producer known for her melodic techno and progressive house sets. She has gained significant popularity through her AI-enhanced live visuals and consistent chart success on Beatport. Ranked #75 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for melodic techno. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and Beatport chart performance.

profiles.name: Honey Dijon
profiles.summary: Honey Dijon is an American DJ and producer who is celebrated for championing black underground dance music. Drawing from Chicago house, Detroit techno, and New York disco, she brings authentic black queer perspective to her sets. Ranked #97 in DJ Mag Top 100 2025.
profiles.sourceNote: Curated as an international reference profile for house/techno with focus on Black underground dance music heritage. Sources include DJ Mag Top 100 2025 and RA artist profiles.
